SECTION HEADLINE:
How Lumina Adapts to Your Day

---

MORNING (6 AM - 12 PM)
Lumina wakes up with you. High color temperature (5600K) delivers energizing, blue-tinted light that signals your body it's time to be alert and focused. Perfect for tackling your most important work when your brain is fresh. No grogginess. No gradual ramp-up. Just immediate, natural alertness.

---

MIDDAY (12 PM - 3 PM)
As noon passes, Lumina maintains balanced white light (4500K) for sustained focus. Your body expects consistent brightness during peak work hours. Lumina delivers, supporting whatever you need to accomplishвЂ”deep work, calls, collaboration.

---

AFTERNOON (3 PM - 6 PM)
The 3 PM energy dip is realвЂ”but Lumina counters it. Color temperature gradually warms (moving toward 3500K) while maintaining bright enough illumination to keep you engaged. It's the difference between hitting a wall at 4 PM and maintaining momentum through the end of your workday.

---

EVENING (6 PM - 10 PM)
As evening arrives, Lumina shifts to warm amber tones (2700K). This signals to your body that work is done and relaxation is beginning. If you work late, Lumina still supports focusвЂ”but the light quality tells your circadian rhythm to start winding down. Better sleep follows naturally.

---

NIGHT (10 PM - 6 AM)
If you're still using Lumina late, it transitions to its most gentle, warm mode. Red-shifted light that minimizes disruption to melatonin production. Some users even keep Lumina in a low-light mode for late-night reading or wind-down time without the sleep disruption of harsh overhead lights.

SECTION HEADLINE:
Built on Real Science

Your circadian rhythm is your body's internal clock. It regulates sleep, alertness, body temperature, and hormone production. Light is its primary signal.

Blue light (higher color temperature) tells your brain it's daytimeвЂ”stay alert. Warm light (lower color temperature) signals eveningвЂ”start producing melatonin and prepare for sleep.

Most offices and homes completely ignore this. Harsh, cool-toned lighting all day. Then bright screens before bed. Our bodies never get the right signals.

Lumina fixes this.

By automatically adjusting color temperature and brightness throughout your day, Lumina works WITH your circadian rhythm instead of against it. The result:
вЂў Better focus during work hours
вЂў More sustained energy (no artificial crashes)
вЂў Better sleep at night
вЂў Improved overall well-being

This isn't theory. This is how human biology actually works. We're just finally giving it the lighting it deserves.

Frequently Asked Questions

---

Q1: How does Lumina know what time it is if I don't set it?
A: Lumina connects to your WiFi and automatically syncs to your time zone. You don't need to set anything. Plug it in, connect to WiFi, and it handles the rest. It's truly plug-and-play.

---

Q2: Do I have to connect my calendar for it to work?
A: Nope. Lumina works great without calendar integrationвЂ”it will automatically adjust based on time of day and ambient light. Connecting your calendar is optional and gives you an extra layer of customization. If you don't want to sync your calendar, Lumina still delivers all the core benefits.

---

Q3: Can I manually adjust the brightness or color temperature?
A: Absolutely. We included a physical touch ring on the lamp for easy adjustments. You can also use the app to override Lumina's settings anytime you want. But once you go a few days with automatic adjustment, most people stop adjusting anything. It's that intuitive.

---

Q4: Will Lumina work with my calendar system?
A: Lumina works with Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, Apple Calendar, and most calendar systems that support standard integrations. Setup takes about 30 seconds. If you use a less common calendar app, reach outвЂ”we're always adding support.

---

Q5: Does Lumina need to be connected to WiFi to work?
A: Yes, Lumina uses WiFi for time-syncing and calendar integration. However, it will still function as a quality desk lamp without WiFi. You'll just need to set the time manually if WiFi isn't available, and calendar features won't work.

---

Q6: How much electricity does Lumina use?
A: Lumina uses approximately 24W of powerвЂ”about the same as a traditional desk lamp. Compared to overhead lighting or older fluorescent fixtures, it's actually more efficient. You won't see any noticeable increase in your electricity bill.

---

Q7: What if I work a non-traditional schedule?
A: The app lets you fully customize Lumina's schedule. If you work nights, sleep days, or have a totally non-standard schedule, you can program Lumina to match your rhythm exactly. It's your lampвЂ”it adapts to you, not the other way around.

---

Q8: Is the light safe for my eyes?
A: Yes. Lumina is designed with eye safety in mind. It produces zero UV or IR radiation, and brightness levels are carefully calibrated to prevent eye strain. It's actually better for your eyes than harsh overhead lighting or traditional desk lamps with no brightness adjustment.

---

Q9: Can I dim Lumina below its minimum brightness level?
A: Lumina's minimum brightness (100 lumens) is calibrated for safe reading and desk work. It won't go lower because dimmer light for reading can cause eye strain. But the touch ring and app both let you adjust freely within the safe range. If you want even warmer light in the evening, we have a separate "sleep mode" that's perfect for winding down.

---

Q10: What's the warranty and return policy?
A: Lumina comes with a 60-day money-back guarantee. If you don't love it for any reason, send it back. No questions asked. Full refund. Plus, you get a 2-year manufacturer's warranty covering all hardware defects. We stand behind this product completely.

---

Q11: How do I set up Lumina?
A: Setup takes 5 minutes:
1. Unbox and plug in (USB-C power)
2. Download the Lumina app
3. Connect to WiFi through the app
4. Optionally sync your calendar
5. Done. Lumina takes it from there.

---

Q12: Can I use Lumina with multiple devices or a smart home system?
A: Yes. Lumina works with Alexa, Google Home, Apple HomeKit, and most major smart home systems. You can control it via voice, routines, or automation. But honestly, most people set it and forget itвЂ”the automatic adjustment is so good, manual control usually isn't necessary.

If you're still using Lumina late, it transitions to its most gentle, warm mode. Red-shifted light that minimizes disruption to melatonin production. Some users even keep Lumina in a low-light mode for late-night reading or wind-down time without the sleep disruption of harsh overhead lights.

SECTION HEADLINE:
Built on Real Science

Your circadian rhythm is your body's internal clock. It regulates sleep, alertness, body temperature, and hormone production. Light is its primary signal.

Blue light (higher color temperature) tells your brain it's daytimeвЂ”stay alert. Warm light (lower color temperature) signals eveningвЂ”start producing melatonin and prepare for sleep.

Most offices and homes completely ignore this. Harsh, cool-toned lighting all day. Then bright screens before bed. Our bodies never get the right signals.

Lumina fixes this.

By automatically adjusting color temperature and brightness throughout your day, Lumina works WITH your circadian rhythm instead of against it. The result:
вЂў Better focus during work hours
вЂў More sustained energy (no artificial crashes)
вЂў Better sleep at night
вЂў Improved overall well-being

This isn't theory. This is how human biology actually works. We're just finally giving it the lighting it deserves.

SECTION HEADLINE:
Frequently Asked Questions

---

Q1: How does Lumina know what time it is if I don't set it?
A: Lumina connects to your WiFi and automatically syncs to your time zone. You don't need to set anything. Plug it in, connect to WiFi, and it handles the rest. It's truly plug-and-play.

---

Q2: Do I have to connect my calendar for it to work?
A: Nope. Lumina works great without calendar integrationвЂ”it will automatically adjust based on time of day and ambient light. Connecting your calendar is optional and gives you an extra layer of customization. If you don't want to sync your calendar, Lumina still delivers all the core benefits.

---

Q3: Can I manually adjust the brightness or color temperature?
A: Absolutely. We included a physical touch ring on the lamp for easy adjustments. You can also use the app to override Lumina's settings anytime you want. But once you go a few days with automatic adjustment, most people stop adjusting anything. It's that intuitive.

---

Q4: Will Lumina work with my calendar system?
A: Lumina works with Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, Apple Calendar, and most calendar systems that support standard integrations. Setup takes about 30 seconds. If you use a less common calendar app, reach outвЂ”we're always adding support.

---

Q5: Does Lumina need to be connected to WiFi to work?
A: Yes, Lumina uses WiFi for time-syncing and calendar integration. However, it will still function as a quality desk lamp without WiFi. You'll just need to set the time manually if WiFi isn't available, and calendar features won't work.

---

Q6: How much electricity does Lumina use?
A: Lumina uses approximately 24W of powerвЂ”about the same as a traditional desk lamp. Compared to overhead lighting or older fluorescent fixtures, it's actually more efficient. You won't see any noticeable increase in your electricity bill.

---

Q7: What if I work a non-traditional schedule?
A: The app lets you fully customize Lumina's schedule. If you work nights, sleep days, or have a totally non-standard schedule, you can program Lumina to match your rhythm exactly. It's your lampвЂ”it adapts to you, not the other way around.

---

Q8: Is the light safe for my eyes?
A: Yes. Lumina is designed with eye safety in mind. It produces zero UV or IR radiation, and brightness levels are carefully calibrated to prevent eye strain. It's actually better for your eyes than harsh overhead lighting or traditional desk lamps with no brightness adjustment.

---

Q9: Can I dim Lumina below its minimum brightness level?

Q10: What's the warranty and return policy?
A: Lumina comes with a 60-day money-back guarantee. If you don't love it for any reason, send it back. No questions asked. Full refund. Plus, you get a 2-year manufacturer's warranty covering all hardware defects. We stand behind this product completely.

---

Q11: How do I set up Lumina?
A: Setup takes 5 minutes:
1. Unbox and plug in (USB-C power)
2. Download the Lumina app
3. Connect to WiFi through the app
4. Optionally sync your calendar
5. Done. Lumina takes it from there.

Q12: Can I use Lumina with multiple devices or a smart home system?
